derive.title: Repo Verified idle
derive.detail: No authenticated repo response is loaded for the mounted item yet. Mount the saved item in Collections Explorer first, then return here to inspect landed repo verification.

derive.title: Repo Verified confirmed
derive.detail: Authenticated repo verification is present and trusted for the mounted item. This is the screen that confirms the repo-side ingest landed and was checked against the verified repo response.

derive.title: Repo Verified review
derive.detail: A repo response is loaded, but trust is not fully established from the available verification state. Review the verified head and paths before treating the ingest as confirmed.

guardrails: Repo-verified panel presentation should stay distinct from client-side apply markers.
Trust labels summarize repo-verified state only; they do not widen write authority.
Boards remain excluded because Boards never use terminal/saves/.
